global_description: Medium-sized rodent with a robust, rounded body covered in dense brown fur. It has a distinctive flat, paddle-shaped tail, large incisors, and webbed hind feet. The head is broad with small ears and eyes, adapted for aquatic environments.

part_details.head: Broad with small ears and eyes, covered in brown fur
part_details.body: Robust and rounded, dense brown fur
part_details.feet: Webbed hind feet, adapted for swimming

spatial_relations: Tail extends from rear of body
